headline: Invesco Announces Changes to its Canadian Product Line-up
summary: Invesco Canada Ltd. ("Invesco") announced today that the firm plans to terminate Invesco Managed Futures Fund and Invesco Global Real Estate Fund (each a "Terminating Fund" and together, the "Terminating Funds"), effective on or about May 29, 2026. Effective immediately, the Terminating Funds are closed to all investments. As a result, it is no longer intended that, as previously announced, CI Global Asset Management will become the investment fund manager, portfolio manager, and trustee of the
